mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYS_USER( ID, ACCT, PWD, REAL_NAME, MEMO, EMAIL, EMAIL_ACTIVE, STATUS, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, CREATION_DATE, CREATED_BY, ENABLED_FLAG, LOGINS, LAST_LOGIN_TIME, NICKNAME, ERRORTIMES, LOGINTIME )VALUES( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{acct,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emailActive,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE, #{createdBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 1, #{logins,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE, #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errortimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{logintime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE SYS_USER SET ID=#id:NUMERIC#, ACCT=#acct:VARCHAR#, PWD=#pwd:VARCHAR#, REAL_NAME=#realName:VARCHAR#, MEMO=#memo:VARCHAR#, EMAIL=#email:VARCHAR#, EMAIL_ACTIVE=#emailActive:VARCHAR#, STATUS=#status:VARCHAR#, LAST_UPDATED_BY=#lastUpdatedBy:NUMERIC#, CREATED_BY=#createdBy:NUMERIC#, LOGINS=#logins:NUMERIC#, NICKNAME=#nickname:VARCHAR#, ERRORTIMES=#errortimes:NUMERIC#, LOGINTIME=#logintime:TIMESTAMP# WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE SYS_USER SET ENABLED_FLAG=0 WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM EXAM.SYS_USER WHERE ACCT=#{acct} AND PWD=#{pwd}
